# minimum CMake version
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16.3)

# project name
project(STRATIFICATION VERSION 0.1 LANGUAGES C)

# copy the config with the specific CMake variables (e.g., STRATIFICATION_VERSION_MAJOR
# and STRATIFICATION_VERSION_MINOR generated by project(...)) replaced
configure_file(include/StratificationConfig.h.in StratificationConfig.h)

# Collect source files
set(SOURCES
    src/stratification_comm.c 
    src/stratification.c 
    src/utils.c
    src/linalg.c
)

# test program
add_executable(test src/test.c ${SOURCES})
# add include paths for the test program
target_include_directories(test PUBLIC include/)
target_include_directories(test PUBLIC "${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}")
target_link_libraries(test 
    PRIVATE
        gsl
        gslcblas
        ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/liblapacke.a
        ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/liblapack.a
        ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/librefblas.a
        m
        gfortran
        quadmath
)



# main program
add_executable(segdp src/main.c ${SOURCES})
# add include paths for the test program
target_include_directories(segdp PUBLIC include/)
target_include_directories(segdp PUBLIC "${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}")
target_link_libraries(segdp 
    PRIVATE
        gsl
        gslcblas
        ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/liblapacke.a
        ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/liblapack.a
        ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/librefblas.a
        m
        gfortran
        quadmath
)

# set C standard 
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED)

add_compile_options(-g -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-optimize-sibling-calls -pthread)
target_compile_options(segdp PRIVATE
    # -fsanitize=address,undefined
    -static           # ask linker for full static
    -static-libgfortran
    -static-libgcc
    # -O3
)

target_compile_options(test PRIVATE
    # -fsanitize=address,undefined
    -static           # ask linker for full static
    -static-libgfortran
    -static-libgcc
    # -O3
)

target_link_options(segdp PRIVATE    
    -static           # ask linker for full static
    -static-libgfortran
    -static-libgcc
    # -static-libasan
    # -fsanitize=address,undefined 
    # -O3
)
target_link_options(test PRIVATE    
    -static           # ask linker for full static
    -static-libgfortran
    -static-libgcc
    # -static-libasan
    # -fsanitize=address,undefined 
    # -O3
)
